title: Push DB Functions executor
description: Pushes all SQL files in db_functions/ to a Postgres database (e.g. CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION). Uses the pg driver and the simple-query protocol so multi-statement files are supported.

env.description: Environment to use (e.g., local, staging, production). The executor reads SQL from .generated/<env>/supabase/db_functions/ and, for local, reads the DB URL from 'supabase status -o env'.

functionsDir.description: Override directory containing .sql files. Relative to workspace root if not absolute. Defaults to .generated/<env>/supabase/db_functions under the project root.

dbUrl.description: Postgres connection string. Overrides $SUPABASE_DB_URL and auto-discovery via 'supabase status'.
